metadata.title: David Melara | Executive Portfolio - Strategy & Operational Integration

identity.name: David Melara
identity.headline: Strategic Commercial and Operational Integration Lead

profile.summary: Executive specialized in translating commercial and operational complexity into strategic decisions. Experienced in integrating critical accounts, resolving cross-functional friction and protecting revenue continuity in technical and service-intensive environments. Combines market vision, operational judgment and systems thinking to sustain value where client, service and production must align with precision.

page1Experience.role: Senior Key Account and Operational Integration Lead
page1Experience.description: Managed critical accounts and resolved friction between professional clients, technical production and service continuity in a clinically driven commercial environment. Intervened on bottlenecks affecting turnaround times, rework levels and revenue stability.

page1Experience.role: Head of Sales Operations / Strategic Manager
bullets: Reoriented the commercial model from transactional selling toward consultative selling and strategic account reading.
Implemented segmentation, prioritization and operational alignment protocols for higher-value accounts.

page1Experience.description: Designed competitiveness initiatives and commercial intelligence frameworks for organizations in growth stages. Facilitated strategic analysis models for market reading, decision-making and institutional alignment.

page2Experience.role: Senior Lecturer — Strategic Marketing and Negotiation
page2Experience.description: Trained executive profiles in strategic negotiation, consumer psychology and market intelligence with an applied focus on decision-making in complex organizational settings.

jobs.description: Consolidated medical territories through technical communication, long-term professional relationship building and disciplined execution in complex pharmaceutical markets.
Developed market presence and sustained commercial performance in complex territories through technical precision, professional engagement and field consistency.
